utterances.speaker: Dr. Green
utterances.text: So ? Come on ! Explain yourself Geller ! First you get my Rachel pregnant !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Yes . Yes , yes I did . But ... but it was , it was just a one night thing . It meant nothing .

utterances.speaker: Dr. Green
utterances.text: Oh ? Really ? That is what my daughter means to you ? Nothing ?

emotion_cause.span: 6_That is what my daughter means to you ? Nothing ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: No ! No sir umm , she means a lot to me . I mean , I care ... I ... I love Rachel .

emotion_cause.span: 6_That is what my daughter means to you ? Nothing ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Oh but not that way . I mean ... I mean I am not in love with her . I love her like a , like a friend .

emotion_cause.span: 9_I love her like a , like a friend .

utterances.speaker: Dr. Green
utterances.text: Oh really ? That is how treat a friend ? You get her in trouble and then refuse to marry her ?

emotion_cause.span: 10_That is how treat a friend ? You get her in trouble and then refuse to marry her ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Hey ! I offered to marry her !

emotion_cause.span: 10_That is how treat a friend ? You get her in trouble and then refuse to marry her ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: But I did not want to .

utterances.speaker: Dr. Green
utterances.text: Well why not ? So you can spend your time with this tramp ? !

emotion_cause.span: 14_why not ? So you can spend your time with this tramp ? !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I am sorry . Dr . Green , Mona . Mona , Dr . Green .
